title: Junior Revenue Manager at Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies:
Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies!
